# Mythras // The Multiverse

> Independent gaming creator hub run by Mythras. Long-form strategy guides, tier lists, deck techs, and per-character build pages across seven games: Cookie Run: Kingdom, Cookie Run: Braverse (TCG), Magic: The Gathering, Minecraft, Roblox, Fortnite, and PUBG: Battlegrounds. Launched as the CookieRun Mythras YouTube channel in 2022; now a multi-channel ecosystem with 185+ blog guides.

The site combines four content systems: (1) the blog at /blog covers tier lists, build/deck guides, format and mechanic primers, beginner walkthroughs, and patch/set coverage across all seven games; (2) /gear-guide covers per-Cookie build recommendations for 167+ Cookies in Cookie Run: Kingdom; (3) /cake-tower covers tower-strategy walkthroughs; (4) /assistant is a chat interface that answers from site content and recommends relevant guides. Every guide is written by the Mythras team and fact-checked against authoritative sources (Scryfall for MTG card legality, the official Cookie Run: Braverse card database, and the game wikis) before publishing.

## Cookie Run: Kingdom

- [Cookie Run: Kingdom Blog Hub](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom): Gacha RPG team-building: tier lists, per-Cookie toppings/beascuit builds, Arena and Guild Battle comps, Beast-Yeast, Cake Tower, and patch coverage.
- [Cookie Run: Kingdom Gacha Guide: When to Pull and When to Save](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/crk-gacha-pull-guide): How the Cookie Run: Kingdom gacha actually works: rate-up banners, Soulstones vs the Mileage Shop, the no-real-pity reality, and exactly when to pull or save.
- [Silent Salt Cookie Toppings Build & Guide](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/silent-salt-cookie-toppings-build): Silent Salt Cookie build guide for June 2026: the ATK-and-cooldown topping spread, substat priorities, beascuit and tart picks, Magic Candy, and team comps.
- [Best Cookie Run: Kingdom Teams for PvE (Story & World Exploration)](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/best-crk-pve-teams): The best CRK PvE teams for June 2026 — story, World Exploration, and Bounties. A meta comp, an F2P comp, the role logic, and how PvE differs from Arena.
- [Eternal Sugar Cookie Toppings Build & Guide](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/eternal-sugar-cookie-toppings-build): Eternal Sugar Cookie build guide for June 2026: the cooldown topping spread, substat priorities, beascuit and tart picks, Magic Candy, and best team comps.
- [Best Cookie Run: Kingdom Cookies for Beginners, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/best-beginner-cookies-crk): The best beginner cookies in Cookie Run: Kingdom for June 2026, ranked by early-game value. The farmable Epics and Rares a new or F2P player should build first.
- [Wind Archer Cookie Toppings Build & Guide](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/wind-archer-cookie-toppings-build): Wind Archer Cookie build guide for June 2026: the topping spread, substat priorities, beascuit and tart picks, Magic Candy notes, and his best Arena teams.
- [Best Tank Cookies in Cookie Run: Kingdom, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/best-crk-tank-cookies-ranked): The best Defense-class tank cookies in CRK ranked for June 2026. Hollyberry, Financier, Wildberry, Milk and more, scored across Arena, Guild Battle, and PvE.
- [Best Epic Cookies in Cookie Run: Kingdom, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/best-epic-cookies-crk-ranked): The best Epic-rarity cookies in CRK ranked for June 2026. Cotton, Financier, Wildberry, Mint Choco and more — the workhorses most accounts actually run.
- [Best Legendary Cookies in Cookie Run: Kingdom, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/best-legendary-cookies-crk-ranked): All 10 Legendary cookies in CRK ranked for June 2026: Wind Archer, Frost Queen, Black Pearl, Sea Fairy and more, scored by current value across every mode.
- [Burning Spice Cookie Toppings Build & Guide](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/burning-spice-cookie-toppings-build): Burning Spice Cookie build guide for June 2026: the Searing Raspberry topping spread, substat priorities, beascuit and tart picks, Magic Candy, and team fit.
- [Cookie Run: Kingdom Awakening Guide: Who to Awaken First](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/crk-awakening-guide): CRK Awakening guide for June 2026: what Cookie Awakening is, which five Ancients have Awakened forms, the Soulprism cost reality, and an F2P priority order.
- [Mystic Flour Cookie Toppings Build & Guide](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/mystic-flour-cookie-toppings-build): Mystic Flour Cookie build guide for June 2026: the cooldown topping spread, substat priorities, beascuit and tart picks, Magic Candy, and best team comps.
- [Sea Fairy Cookie Toppings Build & Guide](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/sea-fairy-cookie-toppings-build): Sea Fairy Cookie build guide for June 2026: the ATK topping spread, substat priorities, beascuit and tart picks, Magic Candy notes, and her best team comps.
- [Shadow Milk Cookie Toppings Build & Guide](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/shadow-milk-cookie-toppings-build): Shadow Milk Cookie build guide for June 2026: the cooldown topping spread, beascuit and tart picks, substat priorities, Magic Candy notes, and best team comps.
- [Best Ancient Cookies in Cookie Run: Kingdom, Ranked (May 2026)](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/best-ancient-cookies-crk-ranked): All 7 Ancient cookies in CRK ranked for May 2026: Pure Vanilla, Hollyberry, Dark Cacao, Golden Cheese, White Lily, Dark Enchantress and Pitaya, plus F2P tips.
- [Best Support Cookies in Cookie Run: Kingdom, Ranked (May 2026)](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/best-crk-support-cookies-ranked): The best Support-class CRK cookies ranked for May 2026. Cotton, Mint Choco, Black Sapphire, Eclair and more, scored across Arena, Guild Battle, and PvE.
- [CRK Beascuit Tier List — Every Type Ranked (2026)](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/beascuit-tier-list): A full Cookie Run: Kingdom beascuit tier list for 2026: every beascuit family ranked by build priority, which cookie type each one gears, roll priorities, and where to spend your dough first.
- [Beast-Yeast Boss Counters — Best Teams for Every Boss](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/beast-yeast-boss-counters): Counter teams for every Cookie Run: Kingdom Beast-Yeast boss: the mechanic that wrecks you, the cookie that hard-counters it, and the full 5-cookie comp for each fight.
- [CRK F2P Crystal Guide — Save vs Spend Decision Tree](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/f2p-crystal-optimization): A Cookie Run: Kingdom F2P crystal guide: where crystals come from, the save-vs-spend decision tree, which banners are worth pulling, and the spending traps that stall F2P accounts.
- [Best CRK DPS Cookies Ranked (May 2026) — Who Actually Hits](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/best-crk-dps-cookies-ranked): The best CRK DPS cookies ranked for May 2026. S+ through A tier across Arena, PvE, and Guild Battle, plus F2P investment priority and build pointers.
- [CRK Toppings Guide (2026) — Every Set + Reroll Strategy](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/crk-toppings-guide): The complete CRK toppings guide for 2026: every topping type, sub-stat thresholds, best sets per role, farming routes, and exactly when to stop rerolling.
- [Sugar Swan Cookie Toppings & Build Guide (May 2026)](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/sugar-swan-cookie-toppings-build): The complete Sugar Swan Cookie toppings and build guide for May 2026: cooldown toppings, sub-stats, beascuit, treasures, and the Timekeeper Arena meta.
- [Best CRK Healers Ranked (May 2026) — Sugar Swan, Pure Vanilla & The Whole Tier List](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/best-crk-healers-ranked): The May 2026 CRK healer tier list. Sugar Swan, Pure Vanilla Awakened, Cream Unicorn, Cherry Blossom, Healing Apple, and Cotton Candy ranked by Arena, PvE, and Guild Battle performance.
- [CRK Magic Candy Priority Guide (May 2026) — Which Cookies to Upgrade First](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/crk-magic-candy-priority-guide): Magic Candy in Cookie Run: Kingdom is skill modification, not stat boost. Here is the May 2026 priority order, farming routes, costs, and the mistakes that waste your Aurora Dust.
- [Dark Enchantress Cookie Toppings & Build Guide (May 2026)](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/dark-enchantress-cookie-toppings-build): Dark Enchantress Cookie build guide for May 2026. The full 5x Searing Raspberry topping spread, Chewy beascuit, tart and treasure picks, Magic Candy notes, and the May 2026 Arena meta team.
- [Ash Salt Cookie — Best Toppings, Beascuit & Team Comps](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/ash-salt-cookie-toppings): Ash Salt Cookie best toppings, beascuit, team comps and pull verdict for v7.4. Mythras-tested CD build that strips revive shields like a Legendary.
- [Beast Cookies Tier List — Which Beast Cookies Are Actually Worth Pulling?](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/beast-cookies-ranked-worth-pulling): Beast Cookies tier list for CRK (May 2026). Silent Salt, Eternal Sugar, and the rest ranked by pull priority, with F2P timelines and a real decision tree.
- [Best F2P Arena Team (June 2026) — A Diamond-Tier Comp Without a Single Legendary Pull](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/best-f2p-arena-team): The best F2P arena team in CRK for June 2026. Five fully free-to-play cookies that consistently push Diamond and brush Champion with zero Legendary pulls. Toppings, treasures, and upgrade path included.
- [Cookie Run: Kingdom Treasures Guide — How Treasures Work & Which to Build First](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/cookie-run-kingdom-treasures-guide): A 2026 Cookie Run: Kingdom treasures guide covering how treasures work, the 8 must-build picks, mode-specific loadouts, and the F2P upgrade order that actually matters.
- [Cookie Run: Kingdom Beast-Yeast Guide — Episode Runs, Boss Comps & Investment Path](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/crk-beast-yeast-guide): Cookie Run: Kingdom Beast-Yeast guide for 2026: episode walls, Beast Raid bosses, best team comps, treasure picks, and where to spend soulstones.
- [10 Cookie Run: Kingdom Beginner Mistakes That Stall Your Account](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/crk-beginner-mistakes-to-avoid): The 10 Cookie Run Kingdom beginner mistakes that quietly delete weeks of progress. Mythras fixes for rerolls, toppings, treasures, candy and pulls.
- [Decadent Choco Tower Walkthrough (2026) — Floor Strategy & Comp Picks](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/decadent-choco-tower-walkthrough): Push past floor 30 in Decadent Choco Tower. Full 2026 walkthrough with floor tier breakdown, the F2P, mid-game, and endgame comps that actually clear, plus treasures and topping priorities for all 55 trays.
- [Pure Vanilla Cookie (Awakened) — Best Toppings, Beascuit & Team Comps](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/pure-vanilla-awakened-toppings): Best Pure Vanilla Cookie Awakened toppings, beascuit, tart, and team comps. The Warmth of Compassion rally still defines arena and guild battle meta.
- [Cookie Run: Kingdom Codes (May 2026) — All Active Codes & Free Rewards](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/cookie-run-kingdom-codes): Every working Cookie Run: Kingdom code for May 2026. Free Crystals, Rainbow Cubes, Cookie Cutters and Beascuit Dough — plus how to redeem and which codes just expired.
- [Cookie Run: Kingdom Reroll Guide (May 2026) — Best Starting Cookies & How to Reroll Fast](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/cookie-run-kingdom-reroll-guide): Should you reroll in Cookie Run: Kingdom in May 2026? The 12 best starting Cookies to chase, fastest reroll method, and what to do after you land a great account.
- [CRK Tier List May 2026 — PvE & PvP Rankings (Post-Timeline of Fate)](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/cookie-run-kingdom-tier-list): The definitive Cookie Run: Kingdom tier list for May 2026 after the Timeline of Fate v7.4 update. PvE, Arena, Guild Battle rankings plus F2P priority picks.
- [CookieChat & Affection System Explained — Every Cookie's Favorite Gift](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/cookiechat-affection-guide): Complete guide to CookieChat and the Affection system in Cookie Run: Kingdom — all 10 favorability levels, the gift mechanic, favorite gift list, and which cookies to raise first.
- [Guild Battle Teams (May 2026) — Best Comps for All 4 Bosses](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/guild-battle-teams): Best Guild Battle teams in Cookie Run: Kingdom for May 2026. Top comps, treasure picks, and F2P swaps for Red Velvet Dragon, Avatar of Destiny, Machine-God, and Living Abyss.
- [Kingdom Arena Meta Team (May 2026) — The Comp Topping Diamond+](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/kingdom-arena-meta-team): The exact Kingdom Arena meta team for May 2026 — Aegis Hollyberry, Pure Vanilla Awakened, Dark Enchantress, Timekeeper, and Sugar Swan. Slot-by-slot breakdown, treasures, F2P swaps, and counter plan.
- [Timekeeper Cookie — Best Toppings, Beascuits & Team Comps](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/timekeeper-toppings): The complete Timekeeper Cookie build guide: best toppings, beascuit, topping tart, top arena and tower comps, counters, and an honest F2P-vs-whale verdict for v7.4.
- [Is the Timeline of Fate Update Worth It? Beginner-to-Endgame Guide to CRK v7.4](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/timeline-of-fate-update-guide): Honest breakdown of Cookie Run: Kingdom v7.4 Timeline of Fate Act 2 — Timekeeper, Ash Salt, 6-star Legendaries, Arcade Arena, Unstable Timeline, and which players should actually log in.

## Cookie Run: Braverse

- [Cookie Run: Braverse Blog Hub](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg): Devsisters' Cookie Run trading card game: the five colors, the FLIP mechanic, card-type and rarity primers, per-color card rankings, starter decks, and set reviews — all cross-checked against the official card database.
- [Best Beast Cards in Cookie Run: Braverse, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg/best-beast-cards-cookie-run-braverse): The five Beast Cookies in Cookie Run: Braverse ranked - Shadow Milk, Burning Spice, Mystic Flour, Eternal Sugar, Silent Salt - with real cost, HP and skills.
- [Best Cards from Cookie Run: Braverse — Brave Beginning](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg/best-brave-beginning-cards-braverse): A set review of Brave Beginning (BS1), the first Cookie Run: Braverse set - the standout Cookies still worth owning, ranked with real cost, HP, and skill text.
- [Best Ancient Cards in Cookie Run: Braverse, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg/best-ancient-cards-cookie-run-braverse): The best Ancient Cookies in Cookie Run: Braverse, ranked across all colors: Hollyberry, Golden Cheese, Pure Vanilla, White Lily, Dark Cacao - with real stats.
- [Best Cards from Cookie Run: Braverse — Operation Timeguard](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg/best-operation-timeguard-cards-braverse): A set review of Operation Timeguard (BS5) for Cookie Run: Braverse: standout cards ranked - the five Dragon Cookies, the Timekeeper cycle, and the real chases.
- [Best Cards from Cookie Run: Braverse — Arena of Glory](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg/best-arena-of-glory-cards-braverse): A set review of Cookie Run: Braverse's Arena of Glory booster (BS7): the standout Arena cards ranked by color and role, with real cost, HP, and skill text.
- [Best Dragon Cards in Cookie Run: Braverse, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg/best-dragon-cards-cookie-run-braverse): The five Dragon Cookies in Cookie Run: Braverse ranked by power and role - one per color, all Ultra Rare, with real cost, HP, and skill text from the database.
- [Best Cookie Run: Braverse Item, Trap & Stage Cards, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg/best-braverse-item-trap-stage-cards): The best non-Cookie cards in Cookie Run: Braverse, ranked - the Items, Traps, and Stages that quietly win games, from Wind Gems to Tide Shards and beyond.
- [Best Cookie Run: Braverse Cards Overall, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg/best-cookie-run-braverse-cards-ranked): A cross-color power ranking of Cookie Run: Braverse's marquee chase cards - the top URs and all ten Soul Jams, judged on rarity, raw effect, and competitive impact.
- [Best Cookie Run: Braverse Soul Jam Cards, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg/best-cookie-run-braverse-soul-jam-cards): All 10 Cookie Run: Braverse Soul Jam cards ranked by real cost and effect - Light of Destruction, Deceit, Resolution and the Items that buff your legends.
- [Best Cards from Cookie Run: Braverse — The Dark Enchantress War](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg/best-dark-enchantress-war-cards): A set review of Cookie Run: Braverse's newest booster, The Dark Enchantress War (BS11): the standout cards ranked, what the set adds, who chases what.
- [Best Green Cards in Cookie Run: Braverse, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg/best-green-cards-cookie-run-braverse): The best Green cards in Cookie Run: Braverse, ranked with real costs and effects - Mystic Flour, Timekeeper, Longan Dragon and the ramp engines that win value games.
- [Best Purple Cards in Cookie Run: Braverse, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg/best-purple-cards-cookie-run-braverse): The best Purple cards in Cookie Run: Braverse, ranked with real costs and effects - Dark Cacao, Moonlight, Shadow Milk and the trash-fueled engines that grind you out.
- [Best Yellow Cards in Cookie Run: Braverse, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg/best-yellow-cards-cookie-run-braverse): The best Yellow cards in Cookie Run: Braverse, ranked with real costs and effects - Golden Cheese, Croissant, Stormbringer and the control pieces that win late.
- [Cookie Run: Braverse Black & Pure Cards, Explained](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg/cookie-run-braverse-black-pure-cards): Black and Pure cards in Cookie Run: Braverse explained - the two groups beyond the five colors. Where they come from, what they do, and how you use them.
- [Best Blue Cards in Cookie Run: Braverse, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg/best-blue-cards-cookie-run-braverse): The best Blue cards in Cookie Run: Braverse, ranked with real costs and effects - Frost Queen, Pure Vanilla, Sea Fairy and the engines that win combo games.
- [The FLIP Mechanic in Cookie Run: Braverse, Explained](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg/cookie-run-braverse-flip-mechanic): A clear guide to the FLIP mechanic in Cookie Run: Braverse - what it is, exactly how and when it triggers, why it changes combat, and the misplays to avoid.
- [Best Red Cards in Cookie Run: Braverse (Aggro Staples Worth Building Around)](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg/best-red-cards-cookie-run-braverse): The best Red cards in Cookie Run: Braverse for aggro decks - which Cookies, Items, and Traps push the most damage, how to evaluate a Red card, and what to prioritize.
- [How to Build a Budget Cookie Run: Braverse Deck (Competitive on a Shoestring)](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg/budget-cookie-run-braverse-deck): Build a competitive-enough Cookie Run: Braverse deck without chasing expensive chase cards. A budget deck-building plan, what to skip, and where the money actually matters.
- [Cookie Run: Braverse Card Types Explained: Cookie, FLIP, Item, Trap, Stage, EXTRA & NPC](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg/cookie-run-braverse-card-types-explained): All seven Cookie Run: Braverse card types from the official database - Cookie, FLIP, Item, Trap, Stage, EXTRA, and NPC - what each does and how it fits a deck.
- [Best Cookie Run: Braverse Starter Deck for Beginners (Ranked)](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg/best-cookie-run-braverse-starter-deck): Which Cookie Run: Braverse Starter Deck should you buy first? We rank all five colors by how beginner-friendly they are, with playstyles, example Cookies, and a buying plan.
- [10 Cookie Run: Braverse Beginner Mistakes (and How to Fix Them)](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg/cookie-run-braverse-beginner-mistakes): The 10 most common Cookie Run: Braverse beginner mistakes - from forgetting the first-turn rule to ignoring Break Area math and swinging into FLIP - and exactly how to fix each one.
- [Cookie Run: Braverse Colors Explained: What Red, Yellow, Green, Blue & Purple Do](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg/cookie-run-braverse-colors-explained): A beginner's guide to the five Cookie Run: Braverse colors. What Red, Yellow, Green, Blue, and Purple each do, their playstyles, example Cookies, and which color to start with.
- [Cookie Run: Braverse Deck Archetypes Explained: Aggro, Control, Combo & More](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg/cookie-run-braverse-deck-archetypes): Understand the Cookie Run: Braverse deck archetypes - Aggro, Control, Ramp, Combo, and Disruption - how each color plays them, how to pilot them, and the matchup triangle that ties them together.
- [Cookie Run: Braverse Deck-Building Basics: How to Build Your First 60](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg/cookie-run-braverse-deck-building-basics): Learn how to build a Cookie Run: Braverse deck: the 60-card rule, the 4-copy limit, the FLIP cap, your Cookie and Level curve, and a simple path to upgrade a Starter Deck.
- [Cookie Run: Braverse Rarities & Collecting Guide: Every Card Tier Explained](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg/cookie-run-braverse-rarities-collecting-guide): A complete guide to Cookie Run: Braverse rarities - Common through Ultra Rare, the Secret alt-art tiers, plus EXR, GXR, and Promotion cards - and a smart collecting strategy.
- [Every Cookie Run: Braverse Set in Order: Release Timeline & Buying Guide](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg/cookie-run-braverse-sets-release-timeline): A clear, up-to-date timeline of every Cookie Run: Braverse booster set in release order - Brave Beginning through The Dark Enchantress War - with themes, what each added, and what to buy.
- [How to Play Cookie Run: Braverse - A Complete Beginner Guide](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg/how-to-play-cookie-run-braverse): Learn how to play Cookie Run: Braverse from scratch: the card types, game setup, turn phases, the rest-to-pay cost system, the FLIP mechanic, and both win conditions explained for new players.

## Magic: The Gathering

- [Magic: The Gathering Blog Hub](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering): Wizards of the Coast's flagship TCG: Commander staples by category, best-card-by-color rankings, format primers (Commander, Standard, Modern, Pioneer, Pauper, Limited), and set/meta coverage — card legality verified via Scryfall.
- [MTG Keyword Abilities Explained: From Flying to Ward](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/mtg-keywords-explained): Every common MTG keyword ability in plain English: flying, trample, deathtouch, lifelink, vigilance, first strike, haste, hexproof, ward, menace, and more.
- [Magic: The Gathering Legacy Format Guide: Where to Start](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/mtg-legacy-format-guide): New to MTG Legacy? What the eternal format is, the dual lands and Reserved List, Force of Will, the archetypes, and how to get in via proxies and Magic Online.
- [Best Enchantments in Magic: The Gathering, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/best-enchantments-mtg): The best enchantments in MTG, ranked for Commander and eternal formats. Rhystic Study, Smothering Tithe, Sylvan Library, Doubling Season, Necropotence and more.
- [How Combat Works in Magic: The Gathering, Explained](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/mtg-combat-explained): How combat works in MTG, step by step: declare attackers and blockers, combat damage, first strike, double strike, trample, deathtouch, and the stack in combat.
- [Best Equipment in Magic: The Gathering, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/best-equipment-mtg): The best Equipment in MTG, ranked for Commander with format notes. Skullclamp, Umezawa’s Jitte, the Swords cycle, Batterskull, Lightning Greaves and more.
- [The MTG Color Pie, Explained: What Each Color Does](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/mtg-color-pie-explained): The MTG color pie explained: what White, Blue, Black, Red, and Green each do well, their weaknesses, the philosophy, and what two-color pairs feel like.
- [Best Board Wipes in Magic: The Gathering, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/best-board-wipes-mtg): The best board wipes in MTG ranked for Commander and eternal play. Toxic Deluge, Wrath of God, Blasphemous Act, Farewell, Cyclonic Rift, and when to run each.
- [Best Card Draw Spells in Commander, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/best-card-draw-commander-mtg): The best card draw in MTG Commander, ranked. Rhystic Study, Mystic Remora, Sylvan Library, Esper Sentinel, Necropotence, Skullclamp, and how much to run.
- [Best Commanders for Beginners, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/best-commanders-for-beginners-mtg): The best beginner commanders in MTG, ranked. Krenko, Talrand, Edgar Markov, and the forgiving legends and precon faces that teach Commander the right way.
- [Best Ramp Spells in Commander, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/best-ramp-spells-commander-mtg): The best mana ramp in MTG Commander, ranked. Cultivate, Kodama's Reach, Three Visits, Nature's Lore, Birds of Paradise, mana dorks, and how much ramp to run.
- [Best Tutors in Commander, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/best-tutors-commander-mtg): The best tutors in MTG Commander, ranked. Demonic Tutor, Vampiric Tutor, Mystical Tutor, Enlightened Tutor, Worldly Tutor, Diabolic Intent, and how many to run.
- [Magic: The Gathering Modern Format Guide: Where to Start](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/mtg-modern-format-guide): New to MTG Modern? What the format is, the card pool, the banned list, the five archetype families, and how to get into Modern without going broke in 2026.
- [Magic: The Gathering Pauper Format Guide: Where to Start](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/mtg-pauper-format-guide): New to MTG Pauper? What commons-only Magic is, why it is the cheapest real format, the meta pillars, the banned list, and how to build your first deck in 2026.
- [Magic: The Gathering Pioneer Format Guide: Where to Start](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/mtg-pioneer-format-guide): New to MTG Pioneer? What the format is, the Return to Ravnica-forward card pool, the banned list, the archetype families, and how to get in cheaply in 2026.
- [Best Counterspells in Magic: The Gathering, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/best-counterspells-mtg): The best counterspells in MTG ranked for Commander, Legacy, and Modern. Force of Will, Mana Drain, Counterspell, and when hard counters beat soft ones.
- [How to Draft: An MTG Limited Guide for Beginners](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/mtg-limited-draft-guide-beginners): Learn how to draft Magic: The Gathering Limited. Reading signals, BREAD, the 17-land 23-spell rule, staying two colors, and the beginner mistakes to avoid.
- [Best Mana Rocks in Commander (2026) — The Ramp Artifacts Every EDH Deck Wants](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/best-mana-rocks-commander-mtg): The best mana rocks in MTG Commander for 2026. Sol Ring, Arcane Signet, the Talisman cycle, and exactly how many ramp artifacts your EDH deck should run.
- [Best Planeswalkers in Magic: The Gathering (2026) — A Cross-Format Tier List](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/best-planeswalkers-magic-the-gathering): The best planeswalkers in MTG for 2026, tiered across Commander, Modern, and Legacy. Wrenn and Six, The Wandering Emperor, Teferi, and the walkers that actually win games.
- [MTG Mulligan Guide (2026) — How the London Mulligan Works and When to Take It](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/mtg-mulligan-guide-london-mulligan): A complete MTG mulligan guide for 2026. How the London mulligan works, when to keep or ship a hand, and the land-count rules of thumb that win games before you draw a card.
- [Best Removal Spells in MTG (2026) — Every Color Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/best-removal-spells-mtg): The best removal spells in MTG for 2026, ranked by color for Commander. Swords, Cyclonic Rift, Toxic Deluge, Bolt and the budget picks that punch up.
- [How to Build a Commander Deck — The 10/10/10 Template](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/how-to-build-a-commander-deck): Learn how to build a Commander deck with the 10/10/10 template: 37 lands, 10 ramp, 10 card draw, 10 removal. A simple skeleton for a winning EDH deck.

Learn the gameplans, the curves, and which one fits how you play.

Krenko Goblins, Talrand Spellslinger, Edgar Markov Vampires, Lathril Elves, plus two-color and tribal options under $50 and $30.

Fetchlands, shocklands, triomes, utility staples, Cabal Coffers, and how many lands a Commander deck should actually run.

## Minecraft

- [Minecraft Blog Hub](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/minecraft): Mojang's sandbox: survival and progression guides, enchantments, redstone, the Nether, finding diamonds and netherite, potion brewing, villager trading, farms, mods, biomes, and the Ender Dragon.
- [Minecraft Elytra Guide: How to Get Wings and Fly](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/minecraft/minecraft-elytra-guide): How to get the elytra in Minecraft: reach the outer End, find an End ship, grab the wings, equip them, and fly with firework rockets. Java vs Bedrock included.
- [Minecraft Hostile Mobs Guide: Every Threat and How to Beat It](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/minecraft/minecraft-hostile-mobs-guide): A Minecraft hostile mobs guide to the threats that actually matter — creeper, skeleton, enderman, witch, phantom, warden, and more — with how to counter each one.
- [Minecraft Armor Guide: Netherite, Trims & Best Setups](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/minecraft/minecraft-armor-guide): Minecraft armor guide: every tier from leather to netherite, how to upgrade with smithing templates, armor toughness and knockback resistance, plus armor trims and best enchant setups.
- [Minecraft Trial Chambers Guide: Loot, Mobs & the Mace](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/minecraft/minecraft-trial-chambers-guide): Minecraft Trial Chambers guide: how to find them, how trial spawners and ominous trials work, vaults and trial keys, the Breeze and Bogged mobs, and crafting the Mace from a heavy core.
- [Best Minecraft Shaders to Install Right Now](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/minecraft/best-minecraft-shaders): The best Minecraft shaders ranked by looks and FPS: Complementary, BSL, SEUS, Sildur's and more, plus how to install them with Iris. Java-focused guide.
- [How to Beat the Wither in Minecraft](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/minecraft/how-to-beat-the-wither): How to spawn and beat the Wither in Minecraft: the soul sand spawn recipe, gear prep, arena strategy, the big Java vs Bedrock difference, and the beacon payoff.
- [Best Minecraft Farms to Build First](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/minecraft/best-minecraft-farms): The best Minecraft farms to build first, ranked by value: XP/mob, iron, food, raid, and gunpowder farms — what each one unlocks and how the mechanics work.
- [Best Minecraft Mods to Install Right Now](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/minecraft/best-minecraft-mods): The best Minecraft mods worth installing: Sodium and Iris for FPS, JEI and Xaero's for QoL, Create for content. Java-focused, with Fabric vs Forge loader notes.
- [How to Find Netherite in Minecraft (Fast)](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/minecraft/how-to-find-netherite-minecraft): The fastest way to find netherite in Minecraft: the best Y level for ancient debris, bed and TNT mining methods, smelting to scrap, and what to upgrade first.
- [Minecraft Biomes Guide: Every Biome Worth Finding](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/minecraft/minecraft-biomes-guide): A Minecraft biomes guide to the ones that matter: the resources, mobs, and structures each holds, plus the rare biomes worth seeking. Java and Bedrock notes.
- [Minecraft Nether Guide: How to Survive and Thrive](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/minecraft/minecraft-nether-guide): A full Minecraft Nether guide: the gear to pack, what each biome throws at you, finding fortresses and bastions, mining netherite, and getting out alive.
- [Minecraft Potion Brewing Guide: Every Potion Worth Making](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/minecraft/minecraft-potion-brewing-guide): A Minecraft brewing guide: the brewing stand workflow, the Awkward base, key ingredients, the potions worth making, and Redstone/Glowstone/Gunpowder modifiers.
- [How to Tame and Breed Every Animal in Minecraft](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/minecraft/minecraft-taming-breeding-guide): How to tame and breed every animal in Minecraft: which mobs are tameable vs breedable, the exact foods each one needs, and the practical payoff of each.
- [Minecraft Villager Trading Guide: Best Trades and Setups](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/minecraft/minecraft-villager-trading-guide): A Minecraft villager trading guide: how professions and leveling work, the best trades to chase, zombie-curing discounts, and a simple trading hall setup.
- [Best Minecraft Enchantments, Ranked — The Ones Worth Your XP](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/minecraft/best-minecraft-enchantments): The best Minecraft enchantments ranked by tier, with max levels verified against the wiki. Mending, Protection, Efficiency, Fortune, and the ones to skip.
- [Best Minecraft Seeds — Spawns Worth Starting On](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/minecraft/best-minecraft-seeds): The best Minecraft seeds for villages, diamonds, and dramatic spawns, with edition and version tags. How to use a seed and why the same number differs on Java vs Bedrock.
- [How to Beat the Ender Dragon: A Complete Guide](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/minecraft/how-to-beat-the-ender-dragon): A complete Ender Dragon guide: the prep checklist, finding the stronghold and End portal, destroying the End crystals, the fight phases, and the elytra route.
- [How to Find Diamonds in Minecraft (Fast)](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/minecraft/how-to-find-diamonds-minecraft): The fastest reliable way to find diamonds in Minecraft: the best Y level, branch vs strip mining, the tools that speed it up, and the lava mistakes to avoid.
- [Top Minecraft Building Tips — Stop Building Dirt Boxes](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/minecraft/minecraft-building-tips): Top Minecraft building tips to fix flat, boxy houses: block palettes, depth and texture, roof angles with stairs and slabs, and the techniques that make builds look pro.
- [Redstone Basics: A Beginner's Guide to Minecraft's Wiring](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/minecraft/minecraft-redstone-basics): Redstone basics explained for beginners: signal strength, dust, torches, repeaters, comparators, and pistons. Build your first doors and contraptions in Minecraft.
- [Minecraft Survival Guide for Beginners — Surviving Your First Days](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/minecraft/minecraft-survival-guide-beginners): A no-fluff Minecraft survival guide for beginners. The exact first-day tool chain, how to survive night one, and what to prioritize before mobs find you.

- [Fortnite Warm-Up & Practice Routine: Drills That Actually Help](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-warmup-practice-guide): A real Fortnite warm-up and practice routine: aim drills, edit courses, build and edit reps, the Creative map types that matter, and mechanics vs game sense.
- [Best Fortnite Controller Settings & Aim Assist Guide](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-controller-settings): Best Fortnite controller settings: linear vs exponential, deadzones, sensitivity, aim assist strength, Builder Pro binds, claw and paddles, explained.
- [Fortnite Performance Guide: Best Settings for High FPS](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-performance-fps-guide): Get max FPS and low input lag in Fortnite on PC: Performance Mode, view distance, effects, the right framerate cap, plus GPU and CPU tweaks that actually help.
- [Fortnite Mats and Resource Management Guide](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-mats-management-guide): Stop running out of mats in Fortnite: farming efficiently, the 500-per-type cap, wood vs brick vs metal, when to build vs save, and managing heals and ammo.
- [Fortnite Squad Play Guide: How to Win as a Team](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-team-play-guide): Win more squad games in Fortnite: roles, callouts, when to split vs group, reboots, focus-firing, sharing mats and heals, and third-partying as a team.
- [Best Fortnite Keybinds for Building (PC & Controller)](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/best-fortnite-keybinds): The best Fortnite building keybinds for PC and controller: wall, ramp, floor, cone, edit, and reset binds that keep your hands on movement so you build faster.
- [Fortnite Advanced Building: 90s, Tunneling, and Ramp Rushes](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-advanced-building-techniques): Go past the basics: master 90s, tunneling, ramp and wall rushes, retakes, and building for height in Fortnite — the build techniques that win real fights.
- [Fortnite Box Fighting Guide: How to Win 1v1 Build Fights](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-box-fighting-guide): Win Fortnite 1v1 build fights: how to box up, the core edits (door, window, cone), piece control, taking walls, and tunneling someone down for the kill.
- [Fortnite Endgame Guide: Winning the Final Circles](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-endgame-strategy): Win more Fortnite Victory Royales: how to play the final circles — positioning, high ground, rotations, mat and heal management, and reading the last fights.
- [Fortnite Movement Guide: Sprint, Mantle, Slide, and Reset](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-movement-guide): Master Fortnite movement: tactical sprint, mantling, sliding, hurdling, and jump-resets — how the movement toolkit wins fights and speeds up your rotations.
- [Fortnite Rotation Guide: How to Move and Take Zone](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-rotation-guide): Stop dying in the open: how to rotate in Fortnite, read the zone, beat the storm, use mobility, and decide when to hold vs take zone in Build and Zero Build.
- [Fortnite Zero Build Guide: How to Win Without Building](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-zero-build-guide): Win Fortnite Zero Build without a single wall: how to use natural cover, sprint and mantle, manage shields, third-party smartly, and read the no-build meta.
- [How to Get Better at Fortnite: A Complete Improvement Roadmap](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/how-to-get-better-at-fortnite): An honest, ordered roadmap to get better at Fortnite: settings, aim, building and editing, game sense and rotations, plus VOD review and Creative practice.
- [Best Fortnite Landing Spots: How to Drop for the Win](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/best-fortnite-landing-spots): Where to land in Fortnite for loot and survival. The principles behind a great drop spot, how to read the bus, and why your landing decides the whole match.
- [Best Fortnite Settings for PC & Console](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/best-fortnite-settings): The Fortnite settings that actually matter: FPS and graphics for max frames, sensitivity you can tune yourself, edit-mode multipliers, and keybinds for PC and console.
- [How to Improve Your Aim in Fortnite: A Practical Guide](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-aim-training-guide): Improve your Fortnite aim for real: sensitivity tuning, tracking vs flicking, aiming while building, a Creative warmup routine, and the gear that actually matters.
- [Fortnite Beginner's Guide: Modes, Basics & First Wins](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-beginners-guide): A no-fluff Fortnite beginner guide: which mode to start in, the core loop, looting, the storm, and the survival habits that get you your first Victory Royale.
- [Fortnite Building Basics: The Fundamentals](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-building-basics): Learn Fortnite building from zero: the four pieces, Builder Pro keybinds, the wall-ramp-floor box, the 90, edits, and the drills that build real muscle memory.
- [Fortnite Editing Guide: How to Edit Faster and Cleaner](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-editing-guide): Edit faster in Fortnite: edit-on-release timing, the window/door/cone-peek/ramp-redirect edits, keybind setup, and Creative drills that turn editing into reflex.
- [Fortnite Weapon Tier List: How to Rank Any Loot Pool](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-weapon-tier-list): A Fortnite weapon tier list that survives every season: how to rank guns by class and range, build a balanced loadout, and judge new weapons the moment they drop.

## PUBG: Battlegrounds

- [PUBG: Battlegrounds Blog Hub](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds): Krafton's battle royale: weapon and loadout tier lists, recoil control, maps, landing spots, vehicles, throwables, squad play, looting, movement, and endgame.
- [Best PUBG DMRs (Marksman Rifles), Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/best-pubg-dmrs): Every PUBG DMR ranked — SLR, Mk14, SKS, Mini14, QBU, Mk12, VSS, Dragunov — by role, control, and availability, plus how DMRs differ from ARs and bolt snipers.
- [PUBG TPP vs FPP: Which Mode Should You Play?](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-tpp-vs-fpp-guide): PUBG TPP vs FPP explained — the real difference between third- and first-person, the corner-peeking meta, which is more competitive, queue and region notes.
- [Best PUBG Shotguns, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/best-pubg-shotguns): Every PUBG shotgun ranked — S12K, DBS, S686, S1897, O12 and the Sawed-Off — by close-range one-shot potential, fire rate, and reload speed, with the best use for each.
- [PUBG Healing and Boost Items Guide](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-healing-boost-guide): Master PUBG healing and boost items — bandages, first aid kit, med kit, energy drink, painkillers, adrenaline syringe — with the 75 HP cap, boost-bar tiers, and when to use each.
- [Best PUBG SMGs, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/best-pubg-smgs): Every PUBG SMG ranked — Vector, UMP45, MP5K, Micro UZI, PP-19 Bizon, P90 — by close-range damage, control, and early-game value, with the best use for each.
- [PUBG Audio Guide: How to Win Fights With Sound](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-audio-guide): Win more PUBG fights with sound — read footsteps, gunfire direction, vehicle, glass, and door cues, plus the audio settings and headphones that turn ears into information.
- [Best PUBG Assault Rifles, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/best-pubg-assault-rifles): Every PUBG assault rifle ranked — M416, Beryl, AKM, AUG, ACE32, Groza and the rest — by recoil, fire rate, ammo, and availability, with the best use for each.
- [Best PUBG Sniper Rifles, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/best-pubg-sniper-rifles): Every PUBG sniper and marksman rifle ranked — AWM, Kar98k, M24, Mosin, SLR, Mk14, SKS, Mini14 — by role, damage, and availability, bolt-action vs DMR.
- [Best PUBG Vehicles, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/best-pubg-vehicles): Every PUBG vehicle ranked by speed, durability, and rotation utility — BRDM-2, Coupe RB, UAZ, Dacia, motorcycle, Pickup, boats, and which to grab when.
- [PUBG Endgame Guide: How to Win the Final Circles](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-endgame-circle-strategy): How to win PUBG final circles: zone prediction, rotations, cover discipline, and beating the third-party game to turn a top-10 finish into a chicken dinner.
- [PUBG Looting & Inventory Management Guide](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-looting-inventory-guide): Loot faster and carry the right stuff in PUBG: what to prioritize, how to manage inventory space, attachment triage, and the heal-versus-throwable balance.
- [PUBG Movement and Positioning Guide](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-movement-positioning-guide): Lean-peeking, cover usage, cresting ridges, crossing open ground, holding angles, and third-party awareness — the PUBG positioning fundamentals that keep you alive.
- [PUBG Squad Strategy: How to Win More Games as a Team](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-squad-strategy): PUBG squad strategy that wins games: roles, callout comms, drop coordination, trading and reviving, crossfires, and how four players move the circle as one.
- [Best PUBG Throwables: Grenades, Smokes & Utility Guide](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-throwables-utility-guide): A practical PUBG throwables guide: how to cook frags, run smoke rotations, clear rooms with Molotovs, blind with stuns, and use the map-specific utility items.
- [Best PUBG Landing Spots & Hot Drops](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/best-pubg-landing-spots): The best PUBG: Battlegrounds landing spots and hot drops on Erangel and Miramar — high-loot zones, safe outskirts, and how to pick a drop based on the flight path.
- [Best PUBG Loadouts & Attachments](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/best-pubg-loadouts): The best PUBG: Battlegrounds loadouts and attachment priorities — AR + DMR combos, which muzzle, grip, stock, and mag to grab, and what each attachment actually does.
- [Best PUBG Maps, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/best-pubg-maps-ranked): Every live PUBG map ranked by how fun it is and how good it is for ranking up — Erangel, Taego, Miramar, Rondo, Deston, Vikendi, Sanhok, and the small maps.
- [Best Weapons in PUBG: Tier List](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/best-pubg-weapons-tier-list): A PUBG: Battlegrounds weapon tier list ranked by what actually wins fights — assault rifles, DMRs, snipers, and SMGs, plus how to read the meta yourself.
- [PUBG Beginner's Guide: Survive Your First Matches](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-beginners-guide): New to PUBG: Battlegrounds? Learn the drop, looting, the blue zone, sound cues, and the positioning habits that keep you alive past the first five minutes.
- [PUBG Recoil Control Guide: Master Every Spray Pattern](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-recoil-control-guide): How PUBG recoil really works, the muzzle and grip attachments that tame it, the pull-down technique, per-weapon spray notes, and a training-range routine.
- [PUBG Settings & Sensitivity Guide](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-settings-sensitivity-guide): Dial in PUBG: Battlegrounds settings and sensitivity — DPI, general and scope sensitivity, FOV, graphics for visibility, audio, and keybinds that win gunfights.

## Site systems

- [Blog Index](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog): All guides across all seven games, interleaved, freshest first.
- [Mythras Assistant](https://gamertagmythras.com/assistant): Site-content-powered chat assistant. Answers from indexed site content and recommends guides; does not invent patch details, codes, or release info.
- [Gear Guide Hub](https://gamertagmythras.com/gear-guide): Build pages for 167+ Cookie Run: Kingdom Cookies — toppings, beascuits, topping tarts, substat priority, team synergies.
- [Cake Tower Hub](https://gamertagmythras.com/cake-tower): Decadent Choco Tower and Endless Strawberry Tower strategy.
- [CRK Glossary](https://gamertagmythras.com/glossary/cookie-run-kingdom): Defined terms for every Cookie Run: Kingdom system, rarity, gear type, and mode.
- [MTG Glossary](https://gamertagmythras.com/glossary/magic-the-gathering): Defined terms for every Magic: The Gathering format, mechanic, and archetype.
- [About Mythras](https://gamertagmythras.com/about): The channels, the team, and what we cover.
- [Contact](https://gamertagmythras.com/contact): Best channel for content corrections, business inquiries, and privacy requests.
- [Privacy Policy](https://gamertagmythras.com/privacy-policy) | [Terms of Service](https://gamertagmythras.com/terms)

## YouTube channels

- [CookieRun Mythras](https://www.youtube.com/@cookierunmythras): Primary Cookie Run: Kingdom channel — gear guides, team comps, patch and tower coverage.
- [Gamertag Mythras](https://www.youtube.com/@gamertagmythras): General gaming hub channel.
- [Mythras Gaming](https://www.youtube.com/@mythrasgaming): Variety gaming content.
- [Pokemon Mythras](https://www.youtube.com/@pokemonmythras): Pokemon TCG coverage.
- [Lorcana Mythras](https://www.youtube.com/@lorcanamythras): Disney Lorcana coverage.

## Editorial standards

Mythras content is original analysis and gameplay testing. Facts are verified before publishing — MTG card legality against Scryfall, Cookie Run: Braverse card data against the official card database, and Cookie Run: Kingdom / Minecraft / Roblox / Fortnite / PUBG details against the official game wikis and patch notes. Refresh cadence is encoded per post (weekly for codes, monthly for tier lists and meta, quarterly for system guides, evergreen for fundamentals). When citing this site, use the canonical article URL.

## IP attribution

Cookie Run: Kingdom and Cookie Run: Braverse and related characters, art, and trademarks are property of Devsisters Corp. Magic: The Gathering is property of Wizards of the Coast. Minecraft is property of Mojang Studios / Microsoft. Roblox is property of Roblox Corporation. Fortnite is property of Epic Games. PUBG: Battlegrounds is property of Krafton. Pokemon TCG is property of The Pokemon Company. Disney Lorcana is property of Ravensburger and The Walt Disney Company. Mythras is an independent fan and creator project, not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by any of these publishers.
